title: Delicate Smoky Spanish Pork Jamon Iberico
description: A delicate and shattering Spanish dish featuring Jamon Iberico, sunflower oil, and render fat, perfect for a special meal prep occasion. This gluten-free friendly recipe is full of herbal flavors.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together smoked paprika, garlic powder, dried thyme, black pepper, and sea salt.
Rub the spice mixture all over the Jamon Iberico pork, making sure to coat it evenly.
Heat the sunflower oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until it is browned.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast the pork for 20 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and brush the render fat over the pork.
Return the skillet to the oven and continue roasting for an additional 10 minutes, or until the pork is cooked through.
Remove the pork from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
